methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.read
documentation:
Reads a CSV file and returns a DataFrame.

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame with the data from the CSV file.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.count_numbers
documentation:
Counts the number of non-null values in a row.

Args:
    row (pd.Series): Row of a DataFrame.

Returns:
    int: Number of non-null values.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.find_essential_start
documentation:
Finds the index of the first row with at least n non-null values.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame with the data.
    n (int): Minimum number of non-null values.

Returns:
    int: Index of the first row with at least n non-null values.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.extract_essential
documentation:
Extracts rows starting from the specified index.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame with the data.
    start_index (int): Index to start extracting from.

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame with the extracted rows.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.extract_columns
documentation:
Extracts specified columns from a DataFrame.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame with the data.
    col_indices (list): List of column indices to extract.

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame with the extracted columns.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.substract_columns
documentation: Subtracts values of two columns in a DataFrame.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.dataframe_to_list
documentation:
Converts a DataFrame to a list of lists.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame to convert.

Returns:
    list: List of lists.

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.check_for_strings
documentation:
Checks for string values in a DataFrame and prints them.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame

methods.name: dtalib.pandas_reader.PandasReader.convert_strings_to_floats
documentation:
Converts string values in a DataFrame to floats.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): DataFrame

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: DataFrame with converted values.

methods.name: dtalib.plot_builder.PlotBuilder.get_graph_image
documentation:
Create a graph.

Args:
    x (list): List of x values.
    y (list): List of y values.
    title (str): Title of the graph.
    x_label (str): Label for the x axis.
    y_label (str): Label for the y axis.
    output_path (str): Path to save the graph image.

methods.name: dtalib.plot_builder.PlotBuilder.get_graph_image_with_lines
documentation:
Create a graph with lines.

Args:
    x (list): List of x values.
    y (list): List of y values.
    title (str): Title of the graph.
    x_label (str): Label for the x axis.
    y_label (str): Label for the y axis.
    output_path (str): Path to save the graph image.
    lines_coords (list[dict]): List of dictionaries with line coordinates.

methods.name: dtalib.float_list_helper.FloatListHelper.crop_lists
documentation:
Crop lists to the same length starting from the specified index.

Args:
    x (list): List of x values.
    y (list): List of y values.
    start (int): Index to start cropping from.

Returns:
    tuple: Cropped lists.

methods.name: dtalib.float_list_helper.FloatListHelper.find_max_index
documentation:
Find the index of the maximum value in the list.

Args:
    lst (list): List of float values.

Returns:
    int: Index of the maximum value.

methods.name: dtalib.float_list_helper.FloatListHelper.find_min_index
documentation:
Find the index of the minimum value in the list.

Args:
    lst (list): List of float values.

Returns:
    int: Index of the minimum value.

methods.name: dtalib.float_list_helper.FloatListHelper.find_end_index
documentation:
Find the index of the end of the list.

Args:
    x (list): List of x values.
    y (list): List of y values.

Returns:
    int: Index of the end of the list.

methods.name: dtalib.float_list_helper.FloatListHelper.find_start_index
documentation:
Find the index of the start of the list.

Args:
    x_cropped (list): List of x values.
    y_cropped (list): List of y values.
    coefficient (float): Coefficient to estimate the start index.

Returns:
    int: Index of the start of the list.

methods.name: dtalib.float_list_helper.FloatListHelper.find_closest_index
documentation:
Find the index of the closest value in the list.

Args:
    lst (list): List of float values.
    value (float): Value to find.

Returns:
    int: Index of the closest value.

methods.name: dtalib.dta_processor.DtaProcessor.find_intersection
documentation:
Find the intersection point of two lines.

Args:
    line1_coords (dict): Dictionary with coordinates of the first line.
    line2_coords (dict): Dictionary with coordinates of the second line.

Returns:
    tuple: Intersection point coordinates.

methods.name: dtalib.dta_processor.DtaProcessor.get_model_and_difference_lists
documentation:
Get model and difference lists from the csv file.

Returns:
    tuple: Model and difference lists.
